rules.title: Decoded suspicious anti-analysis payload
rules.description: Encoded or escaped content decodes to prompt-injection, refusal-bait, or install-hook language.
rules.rationale: Encoding anti-analysis text hides it from simple review while still affecting tools that decode or display it later.
rules.remediation: Remove encoded anti-analysis payloads or suppress inert tests with a documented reason.
rules.attack_narrative: A string hides 'ignore previous instructions' in base64 so naive scans miss it before an LLM review stage decodes it.
attack_examples: A base64 string decodes to reviewer override instructions.
false_positive_examples: A unit test that intentionally verifies decoder behavior.
